examples: I pressed a dime into his grubby mitt.
Five tons of soil would fill a small dump truck; if spread over an acre, it would make a layer slightly less than the thickness of a dime.
A bad contractor may hide mistakes or blame someone else and nickel-and-dime you with extra charges.
But he insisted that nothing he planned would raise the deficit "by a single dime".
These monster production machines can turn on a dime, putting out high-quality, short-run, customized print runs.
